Name: insert_notes
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::uuid AS "author_id", $3::text AS "title") AS data WHERE data."author_id" = $4::uuid), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."notes" ("id", "author_id", "title") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."author_id", check_mutation_result."title" FROM check_mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), nested_replies_data AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::text AS "body" UNION ALL SELECT $6::text AS "body") AS data), _nested_replies AS (INSERT INTO "public"."note_replies" ("body", "note_id") SELECT nested_replies_data."body", mutation_result."id" FROM nested_replies_data, mutation_result RETURNING *), nested_replies_post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _nested_replies WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mutation_result g WHERE _nested_replies."note_id" = g."id" AND g."author_id" = $7::uuid) AND _nested_replies."visibility" = $8::text) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _nested_replies) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), nested_replies AS (SELECT * FROM _nested_replies WHERE (SELECT status FROM nested_replies_post_check) = 1) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id" FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
